pub fn process_request(req: &Request) -> Result<Response, Error> {
    let body = parse_body(req);
    let value = validate(&body)?;
    Ok(Response { data: value })
}

pub fn validate_input(data: &[u8]) -> Result<(), Error> {
    if data.is_empty() {
        return Err(Error::Empty);
    }
    Ok(())
}

pub fn serialize_response(resp: &Response) -> Vec<u8> {
    serde_json::to_vec(resp).unwrap_or_default()
}

pub fn connect_to_database(url: &str) -> Result<Connection, Error> {
    Connection::connect(url).map_err(|_| Error::ConnectionFailed)
}

struct Request;
struct Response { data: Vec<u8> }
enum Error { Empty, ConnectionFailed }
struct Connection;
impl Connection { fn connect(_url: &str) -> Result<Self, ()> { Ok(Self) } }
fn parse_body(_req: &Request) -> Vec<u8> { vec![] }
fn validate(_data: &[u8]) -> Result<Vec<u8>, Error> { Ok(vec![]) }
